_metadata.warning: DIAGNOSTIC ARTIFACT — NOT A DATA SOURCE. No cycle filter applied. This file contains multi-cycle all-time totals, NOT the 2024 cycle partition. Do NOT use for charts or analysis. Use fec_funding_profiles.json (generated by v251d) instead.

query_params.note: Quick test without cycle filter — returns multi-cycle totals

_metadata.purpose: Quick diagnostic test of FEC API connectivity — no cycle filter applied. Returns multi-cycle all-time totals. NOT a data source for analysis.
_metadata.methodology: Single FEC API call to /candidate/{id}/totals/ endpoint with no cycle parameter. Returns all-time totals across all election cycles. Used to verify API connectivity and key validity before running the full v251d pipeline.
_metadata.caveat: Total receipts include contributions from 2022, 2020, and earlier cycles. NOT comparable to v251d cycle-filtered data. Do NOT use for charts or analysis.
